scenarios.name: OOM Kill on payment-api
scenarios.description: Patches memory limit to 30Mi on payment-api to trigger OOM behavior

scenarios.name: CPU Spike on api-service
scenarios.description: Runs CPU stress workload alongside api-service
scenarios.k8s_fault_action: kubectl run cpu-stress --image=busybox -n prod --restart=Never -- sh -c 'while true; do :; done'
scenarios.k8s_restore_hint: kubectl delete pod cpu-stress -n prod --ignore-not-found && kubectl scale deployment/api-service --replicas=3 -n prod
